chronic_kidney_disease.query: "chronic kidney disease" OR CKD OR "renal function" OR "kidney function" OR "estimated glomerular filtration rate" OR eGFR OR albuminuria

urolithiasis.query: urolithiasis OR nephrolithiasis OR "kidney stone" OR "urinary stone"

renal_cancer.query: "kidney cancer" OR "renal cell carcinoma" OR "renal cancer"

urinary_tract_infection.query: "urinary tract infection" OR UTI OR pyelonephritis

lower_urinary_tract_symptoms.label_zh: 下尿路症状/前列腺增生
lower_urinary_tract_symptoms.query: "lower urinary tract symptoms" OR LUTS OR "benign prostatic hyperplasia" OR BPH OR nocturia

lifestyle.query: smoking OR tobacco OR alcohol OR diet OR "dietary pattern" OR "physical activity" OR exercise OR sedentary OR sleep OR obesity OR "body mass index" OR BMI

environmental_pollution.query: "air pollution" OR PM2.5 OR PM10 OR "particulate matter" OR nitrogen dioxide OR NO2 OR ozone OR O3 OR "heavy metals" OR arsenic OR cadmium OR lead OR mercury OR PFAS OR pesticide OR phthalate OR bisphenol OR "water pollution" OR "drinking water"

climate_built_environment.query: temperature OR heat OR "heat wave" OR humidity OR climate OR "climate change" OR "green space" OR greenness OR NDVI OR noise OR "built environment" OR urbanization OR traffic

baseline_disease.query: hypertension OR diabetes OR "diabetes mellitus" OR cardiovascular OR "metabolic syndrome" OR gout OR hyperuricemia OR dyslipidemia OR "baseline disease" OR comorbidity OR multimorbidity

article_type_hint: Observational studies, cohort studies, case-control studies, cross-sectional studies, systematic reviews, and meta-analyses are all eligible for the initial RAG corpus.
